title: SQL: NOT NULL constraint is not checked when applied to
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE);
INSERT INTO bar (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', DATE('2023-01-01'));
ALTER TABLE bar ADD CONSTRAINT a_not_null CHECK (a IS NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO bar (a, b, c) VALUES (NULL, 'example', DATE('2023-01-02'));
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE b IS NULL;
key_bug_features: NOT NULL constraint not enforced after column alteration
